Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CaseSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CaseSettings
public class CaseSettings extends Metadata

Java class for CaseSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CaseSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="caseAssignNotificationTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseAutoProcUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseCloseNotificationTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseCommentNotificationTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseCreateNotificationTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseFeedItemSettings" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FeedItemSettings" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseFeedReadUnreadLtng" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseMergeInLightning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="closeCaseThroughStatusChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultCaseFeedLayoutOn" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultCaseOwner" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultCaseOwnerType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultCaseUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="emailActionDefaultsHandlerClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="emailToCase" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailToCaseSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCaseFeed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCaseSwarming" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCollapseEmailThread" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDraftEmails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEarlyEscalationRuleTriggers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailActionDefaultsHandler" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailContactOnCasePost" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEscalateQfiToCaseInternal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEscalateQfiToCaseNetworks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExtNetworksCaseFeedEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMultiLangSolnSrchCSS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMultiLangSolnSrchPKB" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMultiLangSolution" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSolutionCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSolutionInlineCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSolutionShortSummary" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSuggestedArticlesApplication" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSuggestedArticlesCustomerPortal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSuggestedArticlesPartnerPortal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSuggestedSolutions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="escalateCaseBefore" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="genericMessageEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="keepCaseMergeRecords" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="keepRecordTypeOnAssignmentRule" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="notifyContactOnCaseComment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="notifyDefaultCaseOwner" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="notifyOwnerOnCaseComment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="notifyOwnerOnCaseOwnerChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="predictiveSupportEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showEmailAttachmentsInCaseAttachmentsRL" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showFewerCloseActions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="systemUserEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useSystemEmailAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useSystemUserAsDefaultCaseUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="visibleInCssCheckbox" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="webToCase" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WebToCaseSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getCaseFeedItemSettings

      public List<FeedItemSettings> getCaseFeedItemSettings()
      Gets the value of the caseFeedItemSettings property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the caseFeedItemSettings property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCaseFeedItemSettings().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FeedItemSettings

      Returns:
      The value of the caseFeedItemSettings property.

    • isCaseFeedReadUnreadLtng
